'''waroho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibopamine|ibopamine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-r-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibopamine|ibopamine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| waroho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæreheth|wæreheth]] || [[word:wærehej|wærehej]] || [[word:wærehesh|wærehesh]] || [[word:wærehe|wærehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:warorohoth|warorohoth]] || [[word:warorohoj|warorohoj]] || [[word:warorohosh|warorohosh]] || [[word:waroroho|waroroho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:warohoth|warohoth]] || [[word:warohoj|warohoj]] || [[word:warohosh|warohosh]] || [[word:waroho|waroho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:warofhoth|warofhoth]] || [[word:warofhoj|warofhoj]] || [[word:warofhosh|warofhosh]] || [[word:warofhof|warofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:warohotho|warohotho]] || [[word:warohojo|warohojo]] || [[word:warohosho|warohosho]] || [[word:warohoko|warohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:warohoth|warohoth]] || [[word:warohoj|warohoj]] || [[word:warohosh|warohosh]] || [[word:waroho|waroho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:warohothol|warohothol]] || [[word:warohojol|warohojol]] || [[word:warohoshol|warohoshol]] || [[word:warohokol|warohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:warohothotho|warohothotho]] || [[word:warohojojo|warohojojo]] || [[word:warohoshosho|warohoshosho]] || [[word:warohoko|warohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:warohothon|warohothon]] || [[word:warohojon|warohojon]] || [[word:warohoshon|warohoshon]] || [[word:warohokon|warohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:warohothoro|warohothoro]] || [[word:warohojoro|warohojoro]] || [[word:warohoshoro|warohoshoro]] || [[word:warohokoro|warohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
